name: Hazelnut-Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the Graham Cracker Crumb Crust using the recipe found in Crust Variations.
2. In a heatproof bowl set over hot water, combine heavy cream from the basic recipe with 3 oz chopped semisweet chocolate.
3. Heat and stir frequently until the mixture is melted and smooth. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
4. Stir the cooled chocolate mixture into the cream cheese, sugar, and flour mixture until smooth.
5. Add 1/2 cup finely ground, lightly toasted hazelnuts and 3 oz coarsely chopped semisweet chocolate to the batter at the end.
6. Pour the batter into a prepared pan.
7. Bake as directed in the recipe.
8. Drizzle chilled cheesecake with store-bought chocolate sauce and garnish with hazelnuts if desired.
